---
title: "Notes"
description: "Technical research notes on statistical physics, information geometry, spectral methods, and theoretical neuroscience by Yuda Bi."
keywords: [research notes, statistical physics, information geometry, spectral methods, theoretical neuroscience, Yuda Bi]
listing:
  contents: notes
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  feed:
    title: "Yuda Bi — Research Notes"
    description: "Technical notes on statistical physics, information geometry, spectral methods, and theoretical neuroscience."
    language: en
    items: 20
---

::: {.page-hero}
# Research Notes

Technical notes and tutorials on statistical physics, information geometry, spectral methods, and theoretical neuroscience.
:::
